education: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics & Communication, Kuvempu University - Government, 2003
PGD in MBA IBM (International Business Management), 2013
geographic_experience: Pune, Qatar, France, Italy, Portugal, USA, China, India
key_qualifications: ASQ Membership, American Society for Quality
career_highlights: 22 years of experience in Transportation (Metro Rail Systems) and Avionics Systems (Defence). 7+ years in Metro Rail projects, including 5 years in Pune as Senior QAQC Expert for Pune Metro Rail Project. 13 years in Avionics projects with significant roles in quality assurance and control. Proven track record in leading quality teams and driving organizational QHSE initiatives across various projects.

project_experience.description: Freelancer - PMC, Supplier, Transport/Avionics Project related activities.
responsibilities: QA: Corporate QMS, Reviews (project, documents, Issues) and Audits (IMS, Supplier Qualification, Issue based).
QC: ITP reviews, On Site Inspections (FAT, China), Supplier Procurement Follow-up Actions.

project_experience.description: QA Surveillance role, handling 14+ Contractors in PMC/GC role to Maha-Metro Rail Corporation.
responsibilities: Customer facing role with 14+ Contractor Quality teams to manage (Initialize, Monitoring & Control).
Established, Tailored & Maintain internal QMS (Manual); Approved Contractors' QMS, Mentor/Trained teams.
Approved QA/QC plans (+MS/ITP/Checklists), QA/QC resources based on expertise review.
Witnessed critical RFIs/FAT events of Material/Installation/Testing activities.
Implemented Site QA/QC plans through regular Audits/Site Visits/Reviews/RCAs & related records (KPIs/OBS/NCRs/Snag list).
Conducted Management reviews and Customer Site Visits, CMRS (System Safety) Visits and followed-up actions to closure.
Reviewed status of Contractors and Customer (QRM ppt); Monitored KPIs, Ensured Lessons learnt were managed.
Supervised Lab activities (Contract issues, Tracking testing performance, Invoices etc).

project_experience.description: Organisational Quality and Customer Excellence role, reporting to the Managing Director.
responsibilities: SPOC for QA/QC activities from Concept-Implementation of IoT products.
Established and maintained the QMS implementing the 'Culture of Quality' with focus on COPQ.
Supplier Management (Qualification, Audits and performance monitoring).

project_experience.description: Onshore & Offshore QA Surveillance role, responsible for Engineering and Site Quality.
responsibilities: Tailor & Implement Corporate (Chorus)/Customer processes and train the Thales teams and sub-contractors.
Corporate QMS implementation (+SHE), ISO certification (9001:2015), Tailoring to Customer Process.
QA/QC – PQP/WMS/ITP/MAR/RI/RFIs/Calibration/NCRs, Execution, Reporting, Audits, Supplier Quality, Site Quality QC teams (internal and Sub-contractors) during Material/Installation/T&C phases.
Co-ordination of Safety Assurance (Offshore team), TIMS assessment/PIVS (Internal Audits).
Reporting to Customer, Directors with QA Advise, Alerts and Veto for timely action and follow-up.
Reviews of Bid/SOW/Proposals/Gate reviews/Design Docs/Materials/I,T&C documents and records.
Qualification, Quality supervision and audits of Subcontractors, reporting; material inspections.
Managed Non-Conformances, CAPA, RCA, KPI Analysis; Action Tracking, Risks, Lessons learnt, CSAT actions.

project_experience.description: Onshore role reporting to the Regional QHSE Director.
responsibilities: Implemented Corporate QMS (Chorus 2.0 CPO, Tailoring, trainings, deployment etc.); ISO 9001 certification.
Planning: PQP, WMS/ITPs/Checklists for project including reviews and approvals of offset partner deliverables.
Engineering QA: Gate reviews, Software sampling tests/Build Checks, CSAT, Quality Advice, Track Actions.
Conducted Material inspections of aircraft parts and follow-up actions to closure with France team.
Delivery Management: Inspections (Hardware, Software), raised/tracked NCRs/OBS/Snag list/Issued Alerts & Veto.
Reporting: QA/QC Situational Awareness: Issued NCRs & Quality Advise with focus on Alerts and Veto for timely action.

project_experience.description: Onshore role reporting to the Regional QHSE Director.
responsibilities: QAQC Planning (PQP), WMS/SOPs, Inspections for the entity projects and Portfolios.
Key involvement in Stage Gate reviews (PDR/CDR/FAI etc) (Equivalent to Design and FAT).
QC auditor for Organisation and Product owner for Web based tools using Agile.
Report: QA Advise, KPIs, PMR-WB review of projects, Critical alerts & Veto, Lessons Learnt.
Managed PIVS (Internal Audits) and track/facilitate the findings to Closure of CAR/NCR/OBS with RCA and actions.

project_experience.description: Offshore role reporting to the Program Manager.
responsibilities: Project Initiation (France), planning, training (ADA language), execution, and monitoring control (client reporting).
Requirement analysis, reviews, LLRs, design (CDS: HMI-GUI), coding (OOTH/DO178B), debug and unit testing.
Pre- and post-delivery activities – CM audits, technical release audits (Software), RCA, KPI/Metrics and Analysis.
Key member of Innovation council, Interview panel and training automation.

project_experience.description: System Engineer (Testing) for A380 Aircraft Surveillance System (IHAS-ADIS).
